changeSet.author: HakobAvagyan
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE properties MODIFY type enum('HOUSE','APARTMENT','LAND') NOT NULL;
UPDATE properties SET type = 'APARTMENT' WHERE type = 'APARTAMENT';
ALTER TABLE properties MODIFY type enum('HOUSE','APARTMENT','LAND') NOT NULL;
ALTER TABLE properties MODIFY status enum('FOR_SALE','FOR_RENT','SOLD','RANTED','RENTED') NOT NULL;
UPDATE properties SET status = 'RENTED' WHERE status = 'RANTED';
ALTER TABLE properties MODIFY status enum('FOR_SALE','FOR_RENT','SOLD','RENTED') NOT NULL;

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE properties MODIFY type enum('HOUSE','APARTMENT','LAND') NOT NULL;
UPDATE properties SET type = 'APARTMENT' WHERE type = 'APARTMENT';
ALTER TABLE properties MODIFY type enum('HOUSE','APARTMENT','LAND') NOT NULL;
ALTER TABLE properties MODIFY status enum('FOR_SALE','FOR_RENT','SOLD','RANTED','RENTED') NOT NULL;
UPDATE properties SET status = 'RANTED' WHERE status = 'RENTED';
ALTER TABLE properties MODIFY status enum('FOR_SALE','FOR_RENT','SOLD','RANTED') NOT NULL;
